display.purpose: Hero headlines and onboarding titles. Used sparingly.

headline.purpose: Section headers, result titles, modal headings.

title.purpose: Card titles, subsection labels, drawer headers.

body.purpose: Primary reading text, descriptions, analysis results.

label.purpose: UI labels, category tags, filter titles, button text.

shadows.name: nav-separator
shadows.purpose: Subtle separation for sticky header and bottom nav. Communicates fixed position without weight.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Hover state for cards. Combined with a 4px upward translate.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default transition for state changes: hover, focus, active.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: For elements entering the viewport (fade-in, slide-up).

motion.name: duration-standard
motion.purpose: Standard transitions: hover, focus, background shifts.

motion.name: duration-slow
motion.purpose: Entry animations: modals, drawers, onboarding steps.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call-to-action button. Dark fill in light mode, brand red in dark mode.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background-color: #111827; color: #ffffff; font-family: 'Cairo', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; padding: 14px 32px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #000000; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.95); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; } .ds-btn-icon { width: 16px; height: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Ghost Icon Button
components.description: Auxiliary icon-only button for dark mode toggle, help, and secondary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { width: 36px; height: 36px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background-color: #f8fafc; color: #6b7280; border: none; border-radius: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background-color: #f1f5f9; color: #D32F2F; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #D32F2F; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: scale(0.95); }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Product search field with leading icon and trailing clear button.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { position: relative; width: 100%; } .ds-input-search { width: 100%; padding: 14px 44px 14px 16px; background-color: #ffffff; color: #111827; font-family: 'Cairo', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 16px; outline: none; transition: box-shadow 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), border-color 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-input-search::placeholder { color: #9ca3af; font-weight: 500; } .ds-input-search:focus { border-color: #D32F2F; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(211, 47, 47, 0.3); } .ds-input-icon { position: absolute; right: 16px; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); color: #9ca3af; width: 20px; height: 20px; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Product Card (Grid)
components.description: Product card in 2-column grid layout with image, badges, and add-to-cart.
components.html:
مميز 🔥

دقيق شار خالي من الجلوتين

دقيق

2,500﷼
components.css: .ds-card-product { background-color: #ffffff; border-radius: 24px; border: 1px solid #f3f4f6; overflow: hidden; display: flex; flex-direction: column; cursor: pointer; transition: box-shadow 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-card-product:hover { box-shadow: 0 10px 25px -5px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 0 4px 10px -4px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); transform: translateY(-4px); } .ds-card-image { width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 4/3; background-color: #f8fafc; position: relative; overflow: hidden; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-card-image img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; } .ds-card-badge { position: absolute; top: 8px; right: 8px; background-color: #fbbf24; color: #ffffff; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 9999px; } .ds-card-fav { position: absolute; top: 8px; left: 8px; width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); color: #6b7280; border: none; cursor: pointer; backdrop-filter: blur(8px); transition: color 0.3s; } .ds-card-fav:hover { color: #ef4444; } .ds-card-body { padding: 12px; flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Cairo', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; color: #111827; line-height: 1.25; margin-bottom: 4px; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; } .ds-card-footer { margin-top: auto; padding-top: 8px; display: flex; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-card-category { font-size: 9px; color: #9ca3af; margin-bottom: 2px; } .ds-card-price { font-family: 'Cairo', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 900; color: #D32F2F; } .ds-card-add { width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 12px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background-color: #111827; color: #ffffff; border: none; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); transition: transform 0.15s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-card-add:hover { transform: scale(1.05); } .ds-card-add:active { transform: scale(0.95); }

components.name: Bottom Nav Tab (Active)
components.description: Active tab in the mobile bottom navigation bar.
components.css: .ds-nav-tab { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 100%; padding: 4px 0; gap: 4px; background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; font-family: 'Cairo', sans-serif; transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-nav-tab-active { color: #D32F2F; } .ds-nav-tab-icon { padding: 6px; border-radius: 12px; background-color: #fef2f2; transform: translateY(-2px); transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-nav-tab-active span { font-family: 'Cairo', sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; opacity: 1; }

components.name: Verdict Card Header (Safe)
components.description: Safe verdict result card header with green theme, icon, and title.
components.html:
آمن وشهي ✅ - استمتع به!

تقرير الفحص
components.css: .ds-verdict-header { padding: 24px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; text-align: center; } .ds-verdict-safe { background-color: #f0fdf4; } .ds-verdict-icon-circle { margin-bottom: 12px; background-color: #ffffff; border-radius: 50%; padding: 8px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); } .ds-verdict-title { font-family: 'Cairo', sans-serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700; color: #166534; margin-bottom: 4px; line-height: 1.25; } .ds-verdict-label { font-family: 'Cairo', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; opacity: 0.6; color: #166534; margin-bottom: 8px; }

components.name: Category Pill (Active)
components.description: Selected category pill in the horizontal category scroll.
components.css: .ds-chip-category { padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'Cairo', sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; white-space: nowrap; border: none; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 0.15s; } .ds-chip-category-active { background-color: #111827; color: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 0 2px 4px -2px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-chip-category:hover:not(.ds-chip-category-active) { background-color: #f1f5f9; }

narrative.overview:
Jouda World is a calm refuge from the anxiety of food uncertainty. Every surface, every interaction, every piece of text should reassure the user that they are in a safe, caring place. The visual system borrows from the warmth of a Yemeni home — familiar materials, generous proportions, gentle transitions — not the cold sterility of a medical tool or the aggressive noise of budget e-commerce.

The system uses flat tonal layering instead of shadows for depth. Cards and surfaces shift in lightness to convey hierarchy: white cards float on a cool stone background in light mode; dark surface cards sit on a darker base in night mode. This keeps the interface calm, scannable, and performant.
keyCharacteristics: Warm reds, generous whites, soft rounded corners
Flat depth via colour shifts, no shadows in normal state
Arabic-first RTL with Cairo font throughout
Soft, friendly interactive elements with gentle scale transitions
Explicit rejection of urgency tricks, clinical sterility, and generic SaaS patterns

rules.name: The One Red Rule
rules.body: Brand red (Jouda Red, #D32F2F) is never used for danger or error states. Danger is a separate red (#ef4444). Users must never associate the brand colour with negative outcomes.

rules.name: The No-Pure-White Rule (future)
rules.body: Surface White is #ffffff today because Tailwind's default is unfiltered. Future iterations should tint it toward the warm brand hue at very low chroma (oklch(100% 0.003 25)) so it reads as 'warm white' rather than sterile white.

rules.name: The One-Family Rule
rules.body: Cairo only. No display/body pairing. Consistent font across all surfaces reinforces the companion feel — one voice, one face.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. Shadows appear only as a response to state (hover, elevation, sticky position). If a component needs permanent shadow, the tonal layering is insufficient and should be reconsidered.

dos: Use Jouda Red (#D32F2F) for primary actions, active navigation, and brand accents only. Never for errors.
Keep the surface flat at rest. Use tonal colour shifts (white on stone, gray-800 on gray-900) for depth.
Use Cairo at 700 weight for UI labels and 500 for body text. One font, one voice.
Apply rounded-xl (12px) to buttons, rounded-2xl (16px) to inputs, rounded-3xl (24px) to cards.
Use semantic colours only for their verdict meaning: green = safe, red = unsafe, yellow = uncertain.
Keep Arabic copy warm and personal. Every word should feel like a trusted friend speaking.
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a coloured accent stripe.
Don't apply gradient text (background-clip: text). Emphasis comes from weight and size.
Don't use glassmorphism or backdrop-blur as default decoration.
Don't use the hero-metric template — big number, small label, gradient accent, supporting stats.
Don't build identical card grids with icon + heading + text repeated endlessly.
Don't open a modal before exhausting inline alternatives. Drawers and progressive disclosure first.
Don't look like budget e-commerce. No aggressive sales banners, countdown timers, or discount-heavy UI.
Don't look clinically sterile. No hospital-grade whites, pharmaceutical iconography, or cold medical language.
Don't use decorative motion that doesn't convey state. No orchestrated page-load sequences.
Don't treat Jouda Red and Danger Red as interchangeable. They serve different purposes.
